title: Chalky Crown - Meal Planner Board - Magnetic Dry Erase Menu Board for Fridge Includes 4 Liquid Chalk Markers - Weekly Meal Planner - Blackboard, Grocery List for Kitchen Refrigerator - Black

🧲 Durable - The magnet stays secure to your fridge and will not slide
👶 Kid Friendly - Kids love to use the Menu Board to leave notes for their parents
🌈 Bright Colors - Comes with 4 extra bold chalk markers to last a long time
💖 The Chalky Promise - If for any reason you're not completely satisfied, just contact us and we'll make it right
description: Product Description Durable The magnetic Menu Board will stay secure to your fridge and will not slide! Easy to Clean When you are ready to start over just wipe with a wet or damp cloth to clean your Menu Board and start writing again!
